result:
**Goal: Add a "Shader Toy" mode — a real-time programmable pixel shader engine rendered in ASCII.**

This mode would evaluate mathematical expressions per-pixel each frame to produce animated visual effects entirely in the terminal: plasma waves, tunnel zooms, metaballs, Moiré patterns, fractal flames, and more. Users could cycle through preset "shaders" (each a compact math function of `x, y, time`) with live parameter tweaking. It builds naturally on the project's 3D rendering trend (SDF ray marching, 3D terrain flythrough, volumetric Game of Life) while adding something distinct — a creative, expressive, GPU-shader-inspired playground that runs purely in curses with ASCII/color output.

Want me to build it?
